headline: 9% of Bitcoin at risk from quantum threat

article.title: Nearly 10% of Bitcoin supply is ‘structurally unsafe’ from quantum breakthrough: Glassnode
article.summary: Analytics provider Glassnode identified 10% of Bitcoin supply as structurally exposed to a quantum breakthrough, underscoring the need for a quantum-proof implementation such as BIP-360.

headline: Ethereum Plunges Towards $2K Critical Support Level

article.title: Ethereum traders warn of a ‘nasty’ ETH price drop if $2K support breaks
article.summary: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bearish pattern that preceded a 41% drop in January, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.

headline: Dollar Volatility Plunges 20% Amid FX Trader Shift

article.title: Low Dollar Volatility Forces FX Traders Into Carry, Value Bets
article.summary: A sharp drop in volatility in the US dollar is pushing traders in the $9.5-trillion-a-day currency market toward carry wagers and bets on relative value in search of profits.

headline: US Yields Plunge 5% on Iran Deal Hopes

article.title: US Bonds Jump as Trump Cites ‘Final Stages’ of US-Iran Talks
article.summary: Treasuries surged on investor optimism that the US and Iran were nearing a deal that could ease a rise in global energy prices that has fanned fears around inflation.

headline: Tether Acquires 21 Capital from SoftBank for $1B

article.title: Tether Takes Control of Twenty One Capital After Buying Out SoftBank
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Tether Takes Control of Twenty One Capital After Buying Out SoftBank
Tether has bought out SoftBank’s stake in Twenty One Capital, giving it full control of the Jack Mallers-cofounded firm and positioning it as Tether’s primary public Bitcoin vehicle.

headline: SoftBank Buys 20% of Twenty One for $1Bn

article.title: Tether Tightens Grip on Bitcoin Treasury Firm Twenty One With SoftBank Buyout
article.summary: After dropping nearly $1 billion on the Bitcoin treasury firm co-founded by Tether, Japanese investment firm SoftBank has been bought out.

headline: SC Bans CBDCs, Shields Crypto Users, Miners

article.title: South Carolina Passes Law Banning CBDCs While Protecting Crypto Users, Bitcoin Miners
article.summary: The crypto-friendly legislation was signed into law on Tuesday, granting protections to crypto users, developers, and Bitcoin miners.

headline: Variational Raises $50M in Series A Funding

article.title: Arbitrum-based derivatives venue Variational raises $50 million Series A led by Dragonfly
article.summary: Variational is positioning itself as a retail-friendly brokerage via its in-development Omni app, which will offer "zero-fee" trading.

headline: Hyperliquid ETFs Attract $22.3M in Initial Inflows

article.title: Hyperliquid ETFs draw $22.3 million in early inflows, analysts point to ‘good sign of organic interest’
article.summary: Hyperliquid ETFs have outpaced bitcoin and ether funds in adjusted inflows during parts of their early trading.

headline: Oil Plunges 5% on Supertanker Transit Risks

article.title: Oil drops 5% as 3 supertankers attempt Strait of Hormuz crossing
article.summary: Brent crude falls to $105 a barrel and vessels bound for China and South Korea raise hopes of resumption of energy flows

headline: Energy Stocks Plunge 10% Amid Deepening Crisis

article.title: The energy crisis may just be starting
article.summary: Oil futures markets are sanguine, but history shows expectations have often been disappointed
